messages.type: Select the type of change that you're committing:
messages.scope: Denote the SCOPE of this change (optional):
messages.customScope: Denote the SCOPE of this change:
messages.subject: Write a SHORT, IMPERATIVE tense description of the change:
messages.body: Provide a LONGER description of the change (optional). Use "|" to break new line:
messages.breaking: List any BREAKING CHANGES (optional). Use "|" to break new line:
messages.footerPrefixesSelect: Select the ISSUES type of changeList by this change (optional):
messages.footer: List any ISSUES by this change. E.g.: #31, #34:

types.style: Changes that do not affect the meaning of the code
types.refactor: A code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
types.perf: A code change that improves performance
types.test: Adding missing tests or correcting existing tests
types.build: Changes that affect the build system or external dependencies
types.ci: Changes to our CI configuration files and scripts
types.chore: Other changes that don't modify src or test files
